element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Fighting street gangs and human enemies in confined construction site environment
Shake enemies to stun, directional throws based on d-pad input

element_introduction_order.element: Combo punch chains leading to sonic wave blast
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Repeated punches on grabbed enemies unlock sonic wave discharge attack
Crowd control ability with risk/reward tradeoff

element_introduction_order.element: Directional throw attacks (whirlwind punch, backwards throw)
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: D-pad direction + punch button creates varied throw effects
Most powerful attack; must be charged and manages limited availability
Progression from street gangs and terrorists to sci-fi threats
Mirror match against evil clone; culmination of all learned mechanics
D-pad rotation mechanic replaces arcade punch pad; resource gain opportunity

typical_tension_triggers: Special attack dizzy penalty leaving player vulnerable
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Progressive escalation from street-level human threats through terrorist/alien forces to final boss; beat 'em up rhythm of clear-screen-advance; bonus stages provide pacing breaks and resource opportunities

difficulty_curve.early_game: Introduction to human enemies (street gangs) on construction site with basic punch/jump/grab mechanics in controlled space
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Escalation to terrorist-controlled building and cruise ship stages; introduction of sonic wave, whirlwind punch, and charged D. Punch attacks
difficulty_curve.late_game: Alien and robot enemies in outer space; culminates in clone boss (Heavy Blast Man) requiring mastery of all combat mechanics
notable_spikes: Transition from human to alien enemies at Stage 3
Final boss encounter requiring full arsenal mastery
Introduction of limited D. Punch resource management in mid-game

notable_level_patterns.description: Stages 1-2 feature human enemies (gangs, terrorists); Stages 3-4 feature supernatural threats (giant crab, robots, aliens); Stage 5 features clone boss—creates escalating tone from street-level heroics to cosmic stakes

Each stage presents discrete narrative scenario (woman being assaulted, baby carriage on freeway equivalent, building takeover, ship crisis, asteroid threat in arcade; similar escalation in SNES version)
Between-stage punch strength minigame (arcade test-your-strength adaptation using d-pad rotation) provides resource gain and rhythm variation from main stage combat
